---
name: New Topic Request
about: Request a specific topic be added to an existing section
title: "[TOPIC] "
labels: new-topic
assignees: ''
---

## Topic name

*What is the topic? Be specific: "SQL Injection" is better than "web security topics".*

---

## Section and subdirectory

*Where should this go? e.g., `technical/web-security/`*

---

## What should the topic cover?

*What are the key questions this topic should answer? What should a reader understand after reading it?*

---

## Why is this missing from the repository?

*Is it not covered at all? Covered briefly in another file but deserving its own page?*

---

## Suggested resources

*Any references that cover this topic well.*
